chunks.text: Technical Reports - Nika Haghtalab. Covert Malicious Finetuning: Challenges in Safeguarding LLM Adaption (EECS-2024-216). Danny Halawi, Alexander Wei, Eric Wallace, Tony Wang, Nika Haghtalab and Jacob Steinhardt.

The report is authored by Danny Halawi, Alexander Wei, Eric Wallace, Tony Wang, Nika Haghtalab, and Jacob Steinhardt. It discusses challenges in safeguarding large language model adaptation from malicious finetuning attempts.
